versions.version_description: Acoustic and in a lower key.
Acoustic and in a lower key.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Sisqo
Album: Unleashed
Tab by: dela Paz, Timothy John L.
date: December 18,2006
E mail add: quatog_101@yahoo.com

[Intro] 
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]G#m[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] 

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]2
Bright Lights, Fancy Restaurants[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]2
Everything in this world that a man could want.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]2                                           [ch]G#m[/ch]2
I got a bank account bigger than the law should allow Still I'm lonely now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]2
Pretty Faces from the covers of a magazine[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]2
From their covers to my covers wanna lay with me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]2                                      [ch]Bm[/ch]2/[ch]F#m[/ch]           
Fame and Fortune still can't find, just a grown man runnin' out of time[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]
Even Though it seems I have everything[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
I dont wanna be a lonely fool[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                                      [ch]G#m[/ch]                     
All of the women, all the expensive cars, all the money don't amount to you.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                                [ch]Eb[/ch]                                  
So I can make believe I have everything, but I can't pretend that I don't [/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
see.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]G#m[/ch]
That without you girl my life is incomplete.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch]  
Without you girl [/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]2
Your perfume, your sexy lingerie.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Girl I remember it just like it was on yesterday.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]2                                    [ch]G#m[/ch]2
A Thursday you told me you had fallen in love, I wasn't sure that I was.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]2
It's been a year Winter, Summer, Spring and Fall.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]2
But being without you just aint livin' aint livin'at all[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]2                               BM2/[ch]F#m[/ch]
If I could travel back in time, I'd relive the days you were mine.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]
Even though it seems I have everything[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
I don't wanna be a lonely fool.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                                        [ch]G#m[/ch]                                     
All of the women, all the expensive cars, all of the money don't amount to you.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                               [ch]Eb[/ch]                          [ch]G#m[/ch]          
So I can make believe I have everything,but I can't pretend that I don't see[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]G#m[/ch]
That without you girl my life is incomplete.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
Without you girl[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
I just can't help lovin' you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
But I loved you much too late.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]                          
I'd give anything and everything to hear you say, that you'll stay[/tab]

[Chorus] x2
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]
Even though it seems I have everything.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna be a lonely fool.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                                            [ch]Am[/ch]                                             
All of the women, all of the expensive cars, all of the money don't amount to you.[/tab]
 you can have it all  
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]                                  
So I can make believe I have everything, but I can't pretend that I don't see. [/tab]
 Just give me my baby 
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
That without you girl my life is incomplete.  [/tab]

[Outro] 
 …..for ending it goes like this  
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]       
That without you girl my life is incomplete…… [/tab]
